function.name: get_race_state
function.description: Retrieve the latest unified RaceState snapshot containing car, driver, environment, safety, strategy, and prediction models.

function.name: compute_driver_coaching
function.description: Generate turn-by-turn coaching instructions based on the current RaceState.

race_state.description: The full RaceState object containing all telemetry, models, and predictions.

function.name: compute_pit_strategy
function.description: Compute optimal pit strategy based on tires, fuel, degradation, race context, and predictive models.

race_state.description: The full RaceState object containing all telemetry, models, and predictions.

function.name: evaluate_safety_status
function.description: Evaluate safety conditions, risk levels, incidents, and compliance based on the current RaceState.

race_state.description: The full RaceState object containing all telemetry, models, and predictions.

function.name: run_what_if_scenario
function.description: Simulate an alternative race scenario such as pitting now, staying out, tire changes, or safety car conditions.

race_state.description: The full RaceState object to use as the baseline for simulation.

scenario.description: A natural-language description of the scenario to simulate. Examples: 'pit now', 'stay out', 'switch to softs', 'safety car in 2 laps'.

function.name: generate_post_race_summary
function.description: Generate a structured post-race summary including key moments, strategy evaluation, driver performance, and safety interventions.

race_log.description: A list of TelemetryPoints and race events representing the full race history.
